description: Style NoteSlip your feet into cosy comfort and up your running speed with ease with this pair of socks in off-white from puma. Stitched to perfection, these skin-friendly socks keep the feet dry and  comfortable.Product Details Cream socks Minimal seams on toe for abrasion-free wearDouble layered elasticated mouth for a comfortable wearBranding at the ankle Material and Care70% Cotton 29% Nylon 1% Elastane Machine wash in warm waterWash dark colours separately
